common_ai_mistakes.name: unnecessary_type_assertion
common_ai_mistakes.description: AI frequently uses 'as Type' instead of proper type guards or schema validation. This bypasses TypeScript's type system.
common_ai_mistakes.detection: Detect as assertions on JSON.parse results or API responses.
common_ai_mistakes.fix: Use zod, io-ts, or manual type guards to validate at runtime.

common_ai_mistakes.name: empty_interface
common_ai_mistakes.description: AI sometimes creates empty interfaces or interfaces extending only one other. Use type aliases instead.
common_ai_mistakes.detection: Detect interface declarations with no properties or extending only one interface.
common_ai_mistakes.fix: Replace empty interface with type alias: type MyType = BaseType;

common_ai_mistakes.name: object_type_instead_of_record
common_ai_mistakes.description: AI uses { [key: string]: value } instead of Record<string, value>. Record is cleaner and more idiomatic.
common_ai_mistakes.detection: Detect index signature objects that could be Record types.
common_ai_mistakes.fix: Replace { [key: string]: T } with Record<string, T>.

common_ai_mistakes.name: unnecessary_async
common_ai_mistakes.description: AI marks functions as async when they don't use await. A function that returns a Promise without awaiting doesn't need async.
common_ai_mistakes.detection: Detect async functions with no await keyword inside.
common_ai_mistakes.fix: Remove async keyword if the function never uses await. Just return the Promise directly.

common_ai_mistakes.name: relative_import_hell
common_ai_mistakes.description: AI generates deeply nested relative imports (../../../../). Use path aliases in tsconfig.
common_ai_mistakes.detection: Detect import paths with 3+ levels of ../
common_ai_mistakes.fix: Configure paths in tsconfig.json: { "@/*": ["src/*"] }. Use import { x } from '@/module'.
